title: Leaf removal caution: dense canopy with recent leaf work

recommendations.expected_effect: reduce humidity and canopy wetness conditions while staying in decision-support mode
risks: human review is required before ventilation or dehumidification control changes

recommendations.reason: environmental disease risk proxy review, humidity is high
recommendations.expected_effect: prioritize scouting and preventive review without claiming disease prediction
risks: not actual disease prediction without disease labels

recommendations.reason: cautious leaf removal review only, leaf density is high, humidity suggests airflow review
recommendations.expected_effect: improve canopy airflow only after confirming plant vigor and leaf area
risks: avoid aggressive or repeated leaf removal that reduces plant vigor
recent leaf pruning should lower urgency

recommendations.reason: visible fruit count supports harvest review
recommendations.expected_effect: support harvest timing review using ripening and quality-risk signals
risks: market target and distribution temperature can change harvest thresholds

recommendations.reason: irrigation signal is weak; monitor substrate moisture
recommendations.expected_effect: maintain root-zone water supply without treating the output as a control command
risks: confirm recent irrigation, drainage, and sensor units before changing volume

recommendations.reason: compare root-zone EC with drainage EC before changing fertigation
recommendations.expected_effect: check salinity accumulation or nutrient dilution before adjusting fertilizer strength
risks: do not diagnose plant nutrient status from EC alone

recommendations.reason: pH signal is inside the starting monitoring range
recommendations.expected_effect: support nutrient availability by confirming pH drift with calibrated sensors
risks: pH correction should be gradual and based on repeated measurements

recommendations.expected_effect: review heat-stress mitigation without reducing photosynthesis unnecessarily
risks: excess shading can reduce photosynthesis and delay ripening

recommendations.expected_effect: review heating or thermal protection for flowering, fruiting, and ripening stability
risks: consider energy cost and humidity rise when vents are closed

what_if_simulation.summary: v0 what-if scenario estimate for decision support; compare directions, not precise effects
what_if_simulation.not_validated_warning: This is a what-if scenario estimate, not a validated causal simulation or control command.

potential_risks: temperature may drop if outside air is cold

evidence_references.title: Strawberry growth/yield environment studies and Botrytis environment-risk references
evidence_references.note: Local markdown: 10_Prediction_of_Strawberry_Growth_and_Fruit_Yield_based_on_Environmental_and_Growt.md uses RH, PAR, VPD, CO2, EC, and soil moisture as growth/yield predictors; simulator rules already separate environmental pressure from disease labels.

assumptions: directional v0 estimate based on literature/manual rules
local calibration and human review are required
